title: OPF Language
description: Schema for language records in the pptx.gallery library. Each record names a presentation language and pairs it with sensible default font schemes for PowerPoint and Google Slides output. Languages are referenced from OPF documents via meta.language; the engine resolves the reference against catalogs.languages (inline) → catalogs.languages.source → the default catalog at https://www.pptx.gallery/languages. The meta.language field also accepts BCP-47 tags directly; this catalog is for engine-aware language records that carry default-font hints.

$schema.description: Identifies this record as a language in the pptx.dev library.

id.description: Stable slug used by OPF documents to reference this language via meta.language. Lowercase kebab-case.

code.description: ISO 639-3 (or 639-2) three-letter language code. Carried for engines that prefer ISO codes.

bcp47.description: BCP-47 language tag for this record. Optional — use when the catalog id and BCP-47 form differ.

fontScheme.description: Default font-scheme id for this language when targeting PowerPoint output. Resolves against catalogs.fontSchemes the same way design.fonts.scheme does.

googleFontScheme.description: Default font-scheme id for this language when targeting Google Slides output. Resolves against catalogs.fontSchemes the same way design.fonts.scheme does.

summary.description: One-sentence note about coverage or font defaults.
examples: English language preset using a Latin-script font scheme.
Japanese language preset paired with a Microsoft YaHei East-Asian scheme.

description.description: Longer prose describing the language record and any font-pairing rationale.
examples: English (US) preset. Defaults to Aptos for PowerPoint output and Roboto for Google Slides output. Use this entry as a baseline; override fontScheme on individual decks when brand fonts differ.

tags.description: Free-form labels for filtering and search.

preview.description: Visual previews of the record, used by picker UIs and inline rendering. All sub-fields are optional; engines fall back gracefully when previews aren't available.

src.description: Main preview image (PNG/JPG). Used as the primary visual in picker UIs and previews of the record.

thumbnailSrc.description: Smaller thumbnail preview suited to dense grid views.

vectorSrc.description: SVG / vector preview for crisp scaling at any size.
